author: y4rr
content: Partial closure: 2D×2D + 3D×3D matmul on f32 + f64 + autograd live as of 897849bb. 4 shape-coverage gaps remain (1D×1D dot, 2D×1D mv, 1D×2D vm, broadcast_bmm) — split into sub-cascades #816 #817 #818 #819 (kernel additions on the GpuBackend trait). Will close this umbrella when all 4 sub-cascades land.
